body.title: Local Ollama source: native tool-calling (forward tools, parse tool_calls, dict args)
body.intention: I intend that a tool-capable model on local Ollama (Hex) emits and executes native tool_calls, so DickSimnel can actually build on free local inference.
body.description:
**Problem (surfaced by the DS keystone smoke, T-ds-smoke-pytest):** devstral@Hex received the ticket and knew what to do but emitted its tool call as PROSE ('Write{...}'), never wrote the file, never reached DONE. Root cause: the LOCAL Ollama tool path had three gaps the OpenAI-format path already handled: (1) OllamaSource.call did not forward req.tools to Ollama /api/chat, so the model got no tool schema; (2) _parse_response's Ollama (/api/chat) branch extracted message.content but NOT message.tool_calls; (3) ToolLoop did json.loads() on tool-call arguments, which are a JSON STRING from OpenAI but an already-parsed DICT from Ollama (json.loads(dict) raises TypeError, uncaught).
**Fix (all three):** (1) sources.py OllamaSource.call — add payload['tools']=req.tools when req.tools set. (2) device.py _parse_response — extract tool_calls=msg.get('tool_calls') in the Ollama branch. (3) toolloop.py — accept dict-or-string arguments (isinstance dict → use directly; else json.loads with TypeError guard).
**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/sources.py, unseen_university/devices/inference/device.py, unseen_university/devices/dicksimnel/toolloop.py.
**Design rules:** Inference Proxy only; no SQLite.
**Scope boundary:** the local-Ollama native-tool-calling path only. Cloud OllamaCloudSource already forwarded tools.
**Completion criteria:** a tool-capable model on local Ollama (Hex) emits a native tool_call, the ToolLoop executes it, and the loop reaches DONE. PROVEN LIVE 2026-07-01: DS drove devstral@Hex → Write → DONE in 8.8s, SMOKE_OK.txt created.
**Test plan:** the live DS smoke (T-ds-smoke-pytest) drives devstral@Hex to DONE; unit: OllamaSource.call includes tools in payload when req.tools set; _parse_response extracts tool_calls from an Ollama-format response; ToolLoop accepts dict-form arguments.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Local Ollama native tool-calling fixed (3 gaps): OllamaSource.call forwards req.tools to /api/chat; _parse_response extracts message.tool_calls in the Ollama branch; ToolLoop accepts dict-or-string tool-call arguments. PROVEN LIVE: devstral@Hex emitted a native tool_call → executed Write → reached DONE in 8.8s. 4 hermetic unit tests + the live smoke guard it; 101 inference tests green.
body.unproven_reason: Fixes committed before their tests (no test-without-fix commit for proof_emitter to bind red→green). Proven LIVE + by 4 green unit tests. Same binding gap as [[T-proof-emitter-stub-module-mode]].
